_meta.note: English translation for TERMINAL_VG kiosk at Vorobyovy Gory sports complex.

common._context: Common buttons and labels used across multiple screens

splash._context: Screensaver screen shown when the terminal is idle. User taps to start.

main._context: Main menu with 4 entertainment cards. Each card has a photo, title, and short description.
main.cable_car_desc: A striking landmark of the capital

info._context: Info cards on the main screen: weather, visitor count, opening hours

scan._context: Card scanning screen. User places their ski pass on the reader.
scan.hint: Hold the ski pass near the reader area

topup._context: Ski pass top-up screen. Contains tariffs by day type and age group.
topup.title: Top up ski pass
topup.select_hint: Select a tariff to top up

tickets._context: Ticket purchase screens. Titles/descriptions are loaded from API, these are static fallbacks.
tickets.cable_car_desc: The cable car at Vorobyovy Gory is a unique attraction offering panoramic views of Moscow. The route spans 720 meters over the Moscow River. Cabins feature panoramic glazing.
tickets.alpaka_desc: Alpaca Park is a cozy natural spot with friendly alpacas. Feed the animals, take photos, and relax with the whole family. A perfect place for a walk with children.
tickets.museum_desc: The Museum of Illusions is an interactive space with optical illusions, mirror mazes, and extraordinary installations. Vivid experiences and great photos for the entire family.
tickets.skypark_desc: Skypark is an extreme adventure park with a zipline over the Moscow River. Flight speed up to 40 km/h at a height of 60 meters. Unforgettable thrills and breathtaking views.

rental._context: Equipment rental screen. Category tabs, day type/time toggles, quantity counters.
rental.title: Equipment Rental

instructors._context: Instructor list screen. Tabs by specialization.
instructors.title: Instructor List

pay._context: Payment screen. Shows total amount, order details, and payment methods.
pay.title: Payment
pay.card_hint: Place your card or phone on the payment terminal
pay.cancel_hint: Press the red button on the terminal to cancel

sbp._context: SBP (Fast Payment System) screen. QR code for payment via banking app.
sbp.title: Scan the QR code
sbp.subtitle: Open your banking app and scan the code

success._context: Successful payment screen. Offers to send receipt via email. Auto-returns to main after 15 seconds.
success.title: Purchase completed successfully
success.subtitle: Thank you for your purchase!
success.receipt_question: Would you like to receive a receipt by email?

print._context: Ticket printing modal. Shown while the thermal printer prints tickets.

inactivity._context: Inactivity modal. Appears after 20 seconds of no interaction. 10-second countdown to standby.
inactivity.after_countdown: seconds the screen will go to standby

alerts._context: Toast notifications. Appear at the bottom of the screen for 2.5 seconds.
alerts.select_item: Please select at least one item
